pr.title: mncharsel: Update match_type checks with enum, variable renaming
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Replaced raw mncharsel CSS match_type numeric checks with CSSMatchType enum constants, added the missing TRAINING_MODE enum value for 0x17, and renamed temporary slot-count variables to num_slots. The PR is primarily a readability/type-symbolization cleanup in character select logic, with no review discussion captured in the slice.

key_files.role: Updated match_type comparisons and switch cases from raw integer literals to CSSMatchType enum names; renamed slot-count temporaries; replaced 0x21 character-id sentinel with CHKIND_NONE.

what_changed: Included src/melee/mn/types.h from mncharsel.c so CSSMatchType constants are available.
Changed match_type == 1 to match_type == VS_CAMERA and match_type == 2 to match_type == VS_STAMINA in mnCharSel_8025BD30.

Changed mnCharSel_8025D1C4 switch cases from raw values 0, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, and 10 to VS_MELEE, VS_SUDDEN_DEATH, VS_GIANT, VS_TINY, VS_INVISIBLE, VS_FIXED_CAMERA, VS_SINGLE_BUTTON, VS_LIGHTNING, and VS_SLOWMO.
Added TRAINING_MODE = 0x17 to CSSMatchType and used it for training-mode match_type checks in mnCharSel_8025DAA0, mnCharSel_8025EE8C, and isDuplicateCostume.
Renamed temporary variables var_r0 and var_r28 to num_slots where the value controls whether character-select code iterates over 3 slots for VS_CAMERA or 4 slots otherwise.
Replaced raw char_id sentinel 0x21 with CHKIND_NONE in GameCache entry population.
No functional change is evident from the diff; the changes make existing constants and intent explicit.
smart_moves: Added the missing enum member before replacing 0x17 call sites, keeping the numeric value centralized in CSSMatchType rather than repeating a magic number.
Converted a dense switch over match_type integers into named cases, which makes the supported VS modes self-documenting without altering control flow.
Renamed var_r0/var_r28 only where the inferred meaning is clear from loop bounds, avoiding overbroad speculative naming.
Used existing domain constants such as CHKIND_NONE and VS_CAMERA to remove magic values in adjacent logic, improving future grepability.
decomp_lessons: When a field like match_type already has an enum, prefer using enum names at every comparison and switch site; this documents behavior and reduces the risk of misreading raw values.
If a raw value is repeated but absent from the enum, add the missing enum constant in the shared type header before cleaning call sites.
Temporary register-style names can be safely improved when the variable's role is directly evidenced by nearby logic, such as a loop bound selecting the number of CSS slots.
Sentinel values such as 0x21 should be replaced with existing domain constants like CHKIND_NONE when the surrounding field type makes the meaning clear.
Readability-only symbolization PRs can still be useful for decomp work because they improve searchability and establish names future matching work can reuse.

naming_conventions.name: CSSMatchType
naming_conventions.lesson: Use all-caps enum constants for CSS match modes, e.g. VS_CAMERA, VS_STAMINA, TRAINING_MODE.

naming_conventions.name: TRAINING_MODE
naming_conventions.lesson: Training-mode CSS match_type value 0x17 was promoted from a raw literal into CSSMatchType.

naming_conventions.name: num_slots
naming_conventions.lesson: Use num_slots for local variables that hold the number of character-select player slots to iterate.

naming_conventions.name: CHKIND_NONE
naming_conventions.lesson: Use CHKIND_NONE instead of raw char_id 0x21 when marking an empty/no-character GameCache entry.

assembly_or_matching_tactics: Kept comparisons and switch structure intact while swapping literals for enum constants, a low-risk matching-preserving cleanup.
Variable renaming did not alter code generation but documents inferred register/local purpose for later matching work.
Adding an enum constant in a header is a non-codegen way to improve semantic clarity at all call sites using the same numeric value.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
One issue comment was counted by the dump, but its body was not included in the excerpt, so no reviewer intent can be extracted.
follow_up_queries: Find other mncharsel.c match_type comparisons still using raw numeric literals.
Search for remaining 0x17 CSS match_type checks outside mncharsel that should use TRAINING_MODE.
Search for raw char_id 0x21 assignments that should use CHKIND_NONE.
Audit CSSMatchType usage to ensure all enum values are named consistently across menu code.
